lines.hearsay: Iron was coming off a cart at {place} all morning.
lines.gossip: {A} got the pig iron into {B}'s shop at {place} before the fire was properly hot, and said nothing about it — {A} has worked out that saying nothing is the one thing {B} cannot argue with.
lines.report: {A} delivered pig iron to {B} at {place} against the standing order, slot {slot}.
